# @pierre/trees

> An open source file tree rendering library for the web. Built for extreme performance on large trees, with React and vanilla JS APIs, SSR support, and customizable styling.

- Package: `@pierre/trees` on [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@pierre/trees)
- GitHub: https://github.com/pierrecomputer/pierre
- Install: `npm install @pierre/trees`

## Docs

- [Overview](https://diffs.com/trees/docs#overview): What file tree is, architecture, and getting started
- [Installation](https://diffs.com/trees/docs#installation): Package installation and entry points
- [Core Types](https://diffs.com/trees/docs#core-types): FileTreeOptions, FileTreeSelectionItem, FileTreeSearchMode, and configuration
- [React API](https://diffs.com/trees/docs#react-api): FileTree React component and props
- [Vanilla JS API](https://diffs.com/trees/docs#vanilla-js-api): FileTree class, constructor options, instance methods, and FileTreeStateConfig
- [Git Status](https://diffs.com/trees/docs#git-status): Git-style file status indicators
- [Icons](https://diffs.com/trees/docs#icons): Custom SVG sprite sheets and icon remapping
- [Utilities](https://diffs.com/trees/docs#utilities): sortChildren, generateSyncDataLoader, generateLazyDataLoader
- [Styling](https://diffs.com/trees/docs#styling): CSS variables and inline style overrides
- [SSR](https://diffs.com/trees/docs#ssr): preloadFileTree for server-side rendering and vanilla hydration

## See also

- [@pierre/diffs](https://diffs.com/llms.txt): Diff and code rendering library
- [Full documentation](https://diffs.com/trees/llms-full.txt): Complete @pierre/trees docs in a single file
